parameters.query:
select 
a.id as appointment_id,
p.email as patient_email,
d.consultation_fee

from appointments a
join doctors d on a.doctor_id = d.id
join patients p on a.patient_id = p.id

where a.status = 'completed'
  and not exists (
    select 1 from invoices i where i.appointment_id = a.id
  
  );

insert into invoices (

  invoice_number,
  appointment_id,
  patient_email,
  amount,
  tax,
  total_amount,
  payment_status,
  transaction_reference,
  issued_at,
  due_date,
  paid_at
) values (

  'INV-' || '{{ $json.appointment_id }}' || '-' || TO_CHAR(NOW(), 'YYYYMMDD'), -- 1. Unique string (e.g. INV-1-20260608)
  '{{  $json.appointment_id }}'::bigint,
  '{{ $json.patient_email }}'::varchar,
  '{{  $json.consultation_fee }}'::numeric,
  ('{{ $json.consultation_fee }}'::numeric * 0.13), -- Automatic 13% tax math
  ('{{ $json.consultation_fee }}'::numeric * 1.13), -- Total sum math
    'unpaid',
    null,
    NOW(),
    (NOW() + INTERVAL '7 days')::date, -- Sets a strict 7-day deadline window
    null
);
